name: should create a query showing career gamelogs with a where filter on first game receiving yards
description: Test case for should create a query showing career gamelogs with a where filter on first game receiving yards
expected_query: with "t04486fb95b32d996fc7e3509353cd45f" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "pg"."career_game" between 1 and 1 group by "pg"."pid" having ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) >= '15'), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_1" AS "top_1_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_6" AS "top_6_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "t04486fb95b32d996fc7e3509353cd45f" on "t04486fb95b32d996fc7e3509353cd45f"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "scoring_format_player_careerlogs" as "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d" on "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_1", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_3", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_6", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_12", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
